Issue: Fix memory leak in optional_import traceback handling
Decision: Replace storing live __traceback__ object with traceback.format_exception() string and clear import_exception.__traceback__ = None
Rationale: Prevent garbage collection by breaking reference chain from traceback objects to entire call stacks
Author: aymuos15
Risk: Low (fixes memory leak and improves garbage collection)

Argument.author: coderabbitai[bot]
Argument.argument: No actionable comments were generated in the recent review

Justification: The issue addresses a general code memory leak in utility modules (monai/utils/module.py and monai/transforms/utils.py), which is unrelated to ML-specific lifecycle stages like Modeling Development or Data Preparation.
